heading: Volunteer enhancement pilot projects
label: 760aa–2 Volunteer enhancement pilot projects
notes: Change of NameCommittee on Resources of House of Representatives changed to Committee on Natural Resources of House of Representatives by House Resolution No. 6, One Hundred Tenth Congress, .Jan. 5, 2007

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Subject to the availability of appropriations, the Secretary of the Interior shall carry out a pilot project at 1 or more facilities of the System. Each pilot project shall provide for a volunteer coordinator for the hatchery facility. The volunteer coordinator shall be responsible for recruiting, training, and supervising volunteers. The volunteer coordinator may be responsible for assisting partner organizations in developing projects and programs under cooperative agreements under and coordinating volunteer activities with partner organizations to carry out the projects and programs.section 742f(d) of this title

children.heading: Report
children.label: b Report
children.text: Not later than 3 years after , the Secretary shall submit a report to the Committee on Resources of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Environment and Public Works of the Senate evaluating and making recommendations regarding the pilot projects.October 16, 2006
